summary: Made two surgical seam-level adjustments: tightened the dawn handoff into Chapter 10 and replaced a late safe-house thought that sat too close to a calibration-only style line.
edits: Reworded Damian's private safe-house thought so it keeps the same reluctance to leave without echoing a style-bible example line.
Specified that after moving Damian at dawn, Anya goes north on the narrowed corridor, aligning the chapter's final handoff with Chapter 10's opening.
